Name: Average time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-AE Assign Reviewers
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average time for SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to be followed by any reviewer response activity (e.g., SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Awaiting EIC Decision, conditional on the variant path containing SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Average time it takes SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to lead to a final decision (e.g., SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision) when preceded by SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week measured until the next concrete reviewer action (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer Unavailable)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due across all variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-Reviewer No Response in variants where no agreement occurs within the expected window
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Average time between SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Elapsed time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in prolonged review paths
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-AE Recommendation overdue'

Name: Time it takes SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to transition to SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late in delayed variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is 3 days late'

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week when the process eventually reaches SW-Reviewer Agreed versus when it reaches SW-Reviewer Declined
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time from SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week to the final Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation in multi-round revision variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
